articles.author: Jackson Payne
articles.title: 3 takeaways from BYU’s upset win over No. 10 Texas Tech - Deseret News
articles.description: The BYU Cougars beat the Texas Tech Red Raiders in Provo, Utah, on Saturday.
articles.content:
For the first time since joining the Big 12, BYU has finally defeated Texas Tech.
The Cougars scored a much-needed upset over the Red Raiders in Saturdays regular season finale, orchestrating yet an… [+2802 chars]
